body: Used it for the first time last week. What a time saver. Before, I spent so much time tweaking people's poses… Makes for efficient, and consistent headshots.
alt: Customer photo review from Roger B.

body: I no longer had to place masking tape or duck tape. I just laid down the mat and that was it. Well done!
alt: Customer photo review from Manuel R.

body: Worked like a charm, and made it easy to direct models who aren't used to taking photos. Great product, and I love the option to remove your logo.
alt: Customer photo review from Michael M.

body: Made my job so much easier. No thinking just advising! Clients all thought it was cool!
alt: Customer photo review from Liza H.

body: My headshots are so much smoother with the PosePerfect mat. No confusion or awkward moments during the sessions.
alt: Customer photo review from Jasmin T.

body: I love this mat! Just tell them what color to stand on and their images looked amazing!!
alt: Customer photo review from Michelle A.

body: We've been shooting K-8 sports photos. Everyone gets the same simple message — stand on the blue feet.
alt: Customer photo review from John B.

body: So easy to direct the client to the correct amount of turn and feet spread. Perfect set up every time.
alt: Customer photo review from Kane T.

body: If you do headshots, portraits, or personal branding sessions, it's a game changer.
alt: Customer photo review from Christian F.

body: This was a FANTASTIC product! The subjects really appreciated the help it gave!
alt: Customer photo review from Jamie C.

body: For anyone doing head shots or especially volume head shots, this mat will serve you well.
alt: Customer photo review from Melvin D.

body: Sports portraits move faster when athletes stand on the footprints — consistent stance every time.
